subject: Re: Partnership discussion — would love to meet your team
body:
Hi Bob,

Thanks for following up from our exchange at the conference. I'd be glad to get a formal meeting on the calendar to explore how our teams might work together.

To help me schedule a 30-minute call, could you let me know:
- Your availability next week
- Who else from Vendor Inc. would be participating
- Any specific areas or opportunities you'd like to discuss

As for direct contact details for senior leadership, I'll need to handle that internally through the appropriate channels. Once I understand the scope and participants for our initial call, I can work on connecting the right people on both sides.

Looking forward to your reply.

Best regards
